observations.claim: Roucairol-Cazenave ECAI 2025 search table lists Graffiti 284 as open with n<=50 budget and no refutation found by their algorithms.
No public Lean formalization of Graffiti 284 / Hoffman-Singleton distance CE found on GitHub at search time.
Demonstrandum Zenodo bundle covers Graffiti 143 and 154, not 284.
mewc/math-lab has an algebraic markdown check of the same spectral identity, not a Lean packet.

conclusion: No prior public Lean/Demonstrandum settlement of Graffiti 284 was found. Older automated searches listing 284 as open are compatible with an n=50 Hoffman-Singleton witness at the search ceiling.
